notes:
A small fix for a startle where beginning a numbered list briefly made the note look blank.

**Fixes & polish**

- **Starting a numbered list no longer makes the note look blank.** On macOS, typing `1. ` created an empty numbered item whose "1." marker the system webview failed to draw until you typed a character — so the note, and its mentions, appeared to vanish for a moment. Numbered-list markers are now drawn the same reliable way as bullets, so an empty `1.` item shows correctly right away. (Beta report; feedback #6 / PR #575.)

**Under the hood**

- Ordered-list markers now render via a CSS counter `::before` — matching the existing bullet WebKit fix — instead of the native `<li>` marker, and a defensive guard makes a throw in an editor plugin degrade one edit instead of freezing the note. (feedback #6; PR #575.)
